hypotheses.description: Inspect the frozen resting pose, recovery-target entry/exit events, and contact sequence; test a bounded pose-conditioned recovery state machine before changing the scenario.
hypotheses.rationale: The robot did not reach and hold the shared stable-standing target within the locked time envelope.

hypotheses.description: Compare rigid and articulated reachable recovery workspaces under the same controller authority and locked resting pose.
hypotheses.rationale: A recovery failure may be a morphology reachability limit rather than a controller gain problem.

hypotheses.description: Inspect joint-limit and self-contact frames, then change geometry, joint range, or recovery sequencing only inside an explicit complete-design lane.
hypotheses.rationale: The attempted recovery used structurally unsafe configurations.

stages.name: Command-conditioned locomotion
exitCriteria: All gating cases in the locked command-tracking Benchmark pass.
Every accepted Controller remains compatible with the declared Assembly interface.

stages.name: Autonomous self-righting
exitCriteria: All four locked resting-pose cases reach and hold the shared stable-standing target.
Recovery respects joint-limit, collision, actuator, mass, cost, and Action-width gates.
The selected morphology retains required locked locomotion regressions.

stages.name: Transitions, braking, and visible motion quality
exitCriteria: All gating transition cases pass without regression against command-tracking.
A human-reviewed witness shows accepted motion without unresolved severe visual hypotheses.

stages.name: Robustness and sim-to-real evidence
exitCriteria: All gating held-out plant cases pass with immutable Policy and calibration provenance.
Shadow hardware capture preserves safety, state ABI, and Judge identities.

northStar.statement: Recover from deterministic front, back, and side resting poses, then retain commanded mobility and governed transfer evidence.

interventionSurfaces.rationale: Survival alone did not produce the required signed target-direction progress or the robot moved backward beyond the locked allowance.
The attempted recovery used structurally unsafe configurations.
